'''Angel Wings''' is a dyable equipable accessory that makes your dog look heavenly.
{{Item
| image = Angel_wings.png
| id = angel_wings
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Wool <br>+ Wool Collar
| [[File:Angel_wings_crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}

== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.18.19.
